title: 'Confrontational statements' on Russia: Kremlin slams Nato's Ankara summit
summary_full: Russia continues working-level discussions with the United States regarding Ukraine peace efforts. Kremlin spokespersons expressed hope for successful US diplomatic initiatives to achieve peace. Moscow will closely observe the outcomes of the NATO summit in Ankara. Russia noted confrontational statements made by NATO members before the meeting. The ongoing conflict in Ukraine sees fighting along multiple fronts.
